docs.title: MEDHIRA React Native Responsive Screen
docs.text:
Engineering Intelligence Across Everything

Responsive screen utilities for React Native.

docs.title: Quick Example
docs.text:
import { wp, hp } from 'medhira-react-native-responsive-screen';

const styles = { width: wp('80%'), height: hp('50%') };

docs.title: Functions
docs.text: Function Description widthPercentageToDP(wp) Convert width % to pixels heightPercentageToDP(hp) Convert height % to pixels listenOrientationChange Listen for orientation changes SCREEN_WIDTH Current screen width SCREEN_HEIGHT Current screen height

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
# Expo
npx expo install medhira-react-native-responsive-screen

# React Native
npm install --save medhira-react-native-responsive-screen

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
import { wp, hp } from 'medhira-react-native-responsive-screen';

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    width: wp('80%'),  // 80% width
    height: hp('70%')  // 70% height
  }
});
